82974d04-a5c3-44fc-b85e-21b606420e4e.name: Prompt
82974d04-a5c3-44fc-b85e-21b606420e4e.label: basic
82974d04-a5c3-44fc-b85e-21b606420e4e.description:
Describe the motion, action, camera movement, and audio to generate from the source image. Write the prompt as a clear chronological shot description with concrete visual details and sound cues.

[Prompting guide: key elements](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/prompting-guide#key-elements-to-include)
[Prompting guide: best results](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/prompting-guide#for-best-results)

value.immediate: camera zoom in, hypersized details, deformed nonlinear hyperorthogonal messy mess.

be4e88ee-5e37-421f-adc0-922cae35ffd5.name: Reference Image
be4e88ee-5e37-421f-adc0-922cae35ffd5.label: basic
be4e88ee-5e37-421f-adc0-922cae35ffd5.description: Starting image used to anchor composition, identity, and framing.

d8647624-83d8-408a-89ac-332793d37132.name: Mode
d8647624-83d8-408a-89ac-332793d37132.label: config
d8647624-83d8-408a-89ac-332793d37132.description: Choose the generation branch. Turbo is faster for iteration; Full is slower and intended for higher quality.

c94a289a-1b29-4db5-9076-a5347fcda037.name: Resolution
c94a289a-1b29-4db5-9076-a5347fcda037.label: config
c94a289a-1b29-4db5-9076-a5347fcda037.description:
Choose a preset output size. Higher resolutions need more VRAM, and dimensions must stay divisible by 32.

[Official image-to-video guide: resolution](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#resolution)

0cf7ae72-7161-411b-be1b-b71f5a70fd8d.name: Landscape Width
0cf7ae72-7161-411b-be1b-b71f5a70fd8d.label: hidden
0cf7ae72-7161-411b-be1b-b71f5a70fd8d.description: Choose between the Full HD and HD landscape widths.

5bbf6578-f39b-4c02-90ac-f9e09d5ba6ac.name: Landscape Height
5bbf6578-f39b-4c02-90ac-f9e09d5ba6ac.label: hidden
5bbf6578-f39b-4c02-90ac-f9e09d5ba6ac.description: Choose between the Full HD and HD landscape heights.

1783c541-479b-47da-8339-31663f9d4f8f.name: Full Sampling Steps
1783c541-479b-47da-8339-31663f9d4f8f.label: advanced
1783c541-479b-47da-8339-31663f9d4f8f.description: Base-pass sampling steps for Full mode. Higher values can improve quality but take longer.

b771e6ac-f572-404d-b0ed-aa12cfc5d5c0.name: Distilled LoRA Weight
b771e6ac-f572-404d-b0ed-aa12cfc5d5c0.label: advanced
b771e6ac-f572-404d-b0ed-aa12cfc5d5c0.description: Strength of the distilled LoRA applied to the base model.

7c6cea13-3055-44a2-9b25-d6e4b0d13024.name: Full Distilled LoRA Weight
7c6cea13-3055-44a2-9b25-d6e4b0d13024.label: advanced
7c6cea13-3055-44a2-9b25-d6e4b0d13024.description: Distilled LoRA strength for the Full branch. The current official full-model guide recommends 0.6 for the Stage 2 distilled LoRA.

75502473-26a0-4b63-b8a2-7841f0b2fdc7.name: Turbo Distilled LoRA Weight
75502473-26a0-4b63-b8a2-7841f0b2fdc7.label: advanced
75502473-26a0-4b63-b8a2-7841f0b2fdc7.description: Distilled LoRA strength for the Turbo branch.

6eb0b420-e98b-4e7c-ab9e-c89947f5b769.name: Adapter LoRA Strength
6eb0b420-e98b-4e7c-ab9e-c89947f5b769.label: advanced
6eb0b420-e98b-4e7c-ab9e-c89947f5b769.description: Strength for the optional adapter LoRA. The default adapter is the LTX 2.3 Pop Art LoRA from Civitai.

ca42d212-b720-4764-81bc-b008e5716805.name: Turbo Sampling Steps
ca42d212-b720-4764-81bc-b008e5716805.label: advanced
ca42d212-b720-4764-81bc-b008e5716805.description: Base-pass sampling steps for Turbo mode. Short schedules are intended for fast iteration.

7b49c670-9ce3-4f8d-8781-a59584a011c8.name: Sampling Steps
7b49c670-9ce3-4f8d-8781-a59584a011c8.label: advanced
7b49c670-9ce3-4f8d-8781-a59584a011c8.description:
Number of sampling steps used in the base generation pass. The official guide calls for 8 steps in the distilled workflow and 20-50 in the full workflow.

[Official image-to-video guide: steps](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#steps)

43495d32-52e9-4185-9fcd-62b363dd3399.name: Video Frames
43495d32-52e9-4185-9fcd-62b363dd3399.label: config
43495d32-52e9-4185-9fcd-62b363dd3399.description:
Number of frames to generate. Keep to the standard counts used throughout the official examples, such as 65, 97, 121, 161, or 257. The official guide recommends 121-161 for balanced quality and memory usage, 65-97 for quick iterations, and 257 as the maximum.

[Official image-to-video guide: frame count](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#frame-count)

897b422f-f4d8-42d2-8a1f-9fbad7b8612a.name: Frame Rate
897b422f-f4d8-42d2-8a1f-9fbad7b8612a.label: config
897b422f-f4d8-42d2-8a1f-9fbad7b8612a.description:
Frames per second. Keep it matched across conditioning, upscale, and final video output. The official guide recommends 24 for a cinematic feel, 25 as the default standard, and 30 for smoother action.

[Official image-to-video guide: frame rate](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#frame-rate)

7799e711-ab98-4ca6-86cb-cbd002285e99.name: Height
7799e711-ab98-4ca6-86cb-cbd002285e99.label: config
7799e711-ab98-4ca6-86cb-cbd002285e99.description: Output height from the selected resolution preset.

45da0436-a0a6-43f2-8c99-55d6a408338c.name: Reference Strength
45da0436-a0a6-43f2-8c99-55d6a408338c.label: advanced
45da0436-a0a6-43f2-8c99-55d6a408338c.description: How strongly the source image anchors the low-resolution pass. The upstream two-stage example uses 0.7.

8eb525ea-ab19-48a3-814e-06e37ee43acc.name: Upscale Reference Strength
8eb525ea-ab19-48a3-814e-06e37ee43acc.label: advanced
8eb525ea-ab19-48a3-814e-06e37ee43acc.description: How strongly the source image anchors the upscale pass. The upstream two-stage example uses 1.

ebb43c30-94ce-4efe-b7d2-e72240b78b43.name: Upscale Manual Sigmas
ebb43c30-94ce-4efe-b7d2-e72240b78b43.label: advanced
ebb43c30-94ce-4efe-b7d2-e72240b78b43.description: Manual sigma schedule for the upscale pass. The upstream two-stage example uses four values here.

134da68d-5524-4844-a958-e0a407ee589f.name: Upscale
134da68d-5524-4844-a958-e0a407ee589f.label: config
134da68d-5524-4844-a958-e0a407ee589f.description:
Enable the second pass that doubles resolution and refines detail. Disable it to preview the base pass faster. The official guide recommends previewing Stage 1 first, then enabling the upscale pass once motion and framing are locked.

[Official image-to-video guide: Stage 2 upscale pass](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#stage-2-upscale-pass)

161535f7-f8b8-4208-a3ab-fba6e409a84d.name: 2x
161535f7-f8b8-4208-a3ab-fba6e409a84d.label: config
161535f7-f8b8-4208-a3ab-fba6e409a84d.description: Enable the temporal x2 pass after the spatial upscale pass. This doubles the final framerate to preserve duration and is intended to be used together with Upscale.

fb4a6687-9ecc-4197-b68f-5482242df7d4.name: Lora
fb4a6687-9ecc-4197-b68f-5482242df7d4.label: config
fb4a6687-9ecc-4197-b68f-5482242df7d4.description: Use the optional adapter LoRA for this generation.

0903b19e-a538-4574-b848-e4e24b50c2fa.name: Adapter LoRA Trigger
0903b19e-a538-4574-b848-e4e24b50c2fa.label: advanced
0903b19e-a538-4574-b848-e4e24b50c2fa.description: Trigger text prepended to the prompt when the adapter LoRA is enabled. The default Pop Art adapter uses p0p-@rt.

1125c4d2-12ed-4e42-816d-84fda9e45805.name: Seed
1125c4d2-12ed-4e42-816d-84fda9e45805.label: config
1125c4d2-12ed-4e42-816d-84fda9e45805.description:
Controls random variation. Keep it fixed for repeatable comparisons, or change it to explore motion variants.

[Official image-to-video guide: seed](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#seed)

9751bfa1-4482-4030-a078-e9e0842aef33.name: Width
9751bfa1-4482-4030-a078-e9e0842aef33.label: config
9751bfa1-4482-4030-a078-e9e0842aef33.description: Output width from the selected resolution preset.

27c1852d-a0bf-497c-be97-dd354c87df49.name: Model Variant
27c1852d-a0bf-497c-be97-dd354c87df49.label: config
27c1852d-a0bf-497c-be97-dd354c87df49.description: Select the LTX 2.3 model package used for generation.

dcdb3398-36c7-4105-8374-0da269246b4b.name: Apply Adapter LoRA
dcdb3398-36c7-4105-8374-0da269246b4b.label: advanced
dcdb3398-36c7-4105-8374-0da269246b4b.description: Apply the optional adapter LoRA after the distilled LoRA.

801a5b45-c683-45f3-9d14-1cba62c73d33.name: Selected Model
801a5b45-c683-45f3-9d14-1cba62c73d33.label: advanced
801a5b45-c683-45f3-9d14-1cba62c73d33.description: Switches between the standard LTX 2.3 model path and the adapter LoRA path.

43a8a02d-9fbd-492f-9419-bd6d2a7c90e9.name: NVIDIA FP4 Checkpoint URL
43a8a02d-9fbd-492f-9419-bd6d2a7c90e9.label: advanced
43a8a02d-9fbd-492f-9419-bd6d2a7c90e9.description: LTX 2.3 NVFP4 checkpoint from the Civitai FP4 package.

9f2fc810-fc58-4be1-8982-5c274fdf57a3.name: NVIDIA FP4 Text Projection URL
9f2fc810-fc58-4be1-8982-5c274fdf57a3.label: advanced
9f2fc810-fc58-4be1-8982-5c274fdf57a3.description: Text projection file paired with the Civitai FP4 package.

9c4e2f97-0f79-42d3-aa93-7d0a8923ca64.name: NVIDIA FP4 Video VAE URL
9c4e2f97-0f79-42d3-aa93-7d0a8923ca64.label: advanced
9c4e2f97-0f79-42d3-aa93-7d0a8923ca64.description: Video VAE file paired with the Civitai FP4 package.

1f433e92-1b0d-4558-a94b-0884efaafe63.name: NVIDIA FP4 Audio VAE URL
1f433e92-1b0d-4558-a94b-0884efaafe63.label: advanced
1f433e92-1b0d-4558-a94b-0884efaafe63.description: Audio VAE file paired with the Civitai FP4 package.

d5aad3c1-5a63-44ec-8bf7-b5a7c93e5658.name: Selected Checkpoint
d5aad3c1-5a63-44ec-8bf7-b5a7c93e5658.label: advanced
d5aad3c1-5a63-44ec-8bf7-b5a7c93e5658.description: Switches between the standard LTX 2.3 checkpoint and the NVIDIA FP4 checkpoint.

6c0d508d-b3cb-4fc7-923b-f62862e06e65.name: Selected Text Projection
6c0d508d-b3cb-4fc7-923b-f62862e06e65.label: advanced
6c0d508d-b3cb-4fc7-923b-f62862e06e65.description: Switches between the standard text projection and the NVIDIA FP4 package text projection.

b44ab348-bc0c-49e9-997f-7087a041d330.name: Selected Video VAE
b44ab348-bc0c-49e9-997f-7087a041d330.label: advanced
b44ab348-bc0c-49e9-997f-7087a041d330.description: Switches between the checkpoint VAE and the NVIDIA FP4 package video VAE.

f7559874-d0ed-4853-94a5-92461cd230e6.name: Selected Audio VAE
f7559874-d0ed-4853-94a5-92461cd230e6.label: advanced
f7559874-d0ed-4853-94a5-92461cd230e6.description: Switches between the standard audio VAE and the NVIDIA FP4 package audio VAE.

40b26b67-2e4e-4c0e-b196-ba8bbfbba52a.name: Base Guidance
40b26b67-2e4e-4c0e-b196-ba8bbfbba52a.label: advanced
40b26b67-2e4e-4c0e-b196-ba8bbfbba52a.description:
Classifier-free guidance for the base pass. Upstream two-stage examples keep this close to 1.

[Official image-to-video guide: CFG](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#cfg-classifier-free-guidance)

3c127693-2950-4c1a-9910-e22089f0d13a.name: Base Sampler Type
3c127693-2950-4c1a-9910-e22089f0d13a.label: advanced
3c127693-2950-4c1a-9910-e22089f0d13a.description:
Sampler used in the base generation pass.

[Official image-to-video guide: sampler type](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#sampler-type)

de461f39-2e88-4a32-9a29-aa2be3fa014d.name: Full Base Sampler Type
de461f39-2e88-4a32-9a29-aa2be3fa014d.label: advanced
de461f39-2e88-4a32-9a29-aa2be3fa014d.description: Base-pass sampler for the Full branch.

f2ad1572-9d89-4103-a9ca-0c7fec1047bc.name: Turbo Base Sampler Type
f2ad1572-9d89-4103-a9ca-0c7fec1047bc.label: advanced
f2ad1572-9d89-4103-a9ca-0c7fec1047bc.description: Base-pass sampler for the Turbo branch.

4550665e-5f34-482a-811d-ecd708e834a5.name: Base Shift
4550665e-5f34-482a-811d-ecd708e834a5.label: advanced
4550665e-5f34-482a-811d-ecd708e834a5.description: Scheduler shift value for the base pass.

9a2a034c-c7ea-4bb9-a792-ad0527579f8c.name: Batch Size
9a2a034c-c7ea-4bb9-a792-ad0527579f8c.label: advanced
9a2a034c-c7ea-4bb9-a792-ad0527579f8c.description: Number of videos generated in one run. Higher values need more memory.

c77f893c-7e1f-4716-ae65-baaf668ef6a1.name: Disable Image Injection
c77f893c-7e1f-4716-ae65-baaf668ef6a1.label: advanced
c77f893c-7e1f-4716-ae65-baaf668ef6a1.description: Bypass image conditioning and behave more like text-to-video. Leave disabled for normal image-to-video use.

0187b692-90d5-4711-aeba-7eaa13c4b7b3.name: Frame Rate (float)
0187b692-90d5-4711-aeba-7eaa13c4b7b3.label: hidden
0187b692-90d5-4711-aeba-7eaa13c4b7b3.description: Floating-point fps value fed into conditioning and final video creation nodes.

769e1149-2a1f-4e81-8e03-ab532d87ceec.name: Float Zero
769e1149-2a1f-4e81-8e03-ab532d87ceec.label: hidden
769e1149-2a1f-4e81-8e03-ab532d87ceec.description: Hidden helper to cast integer fps controls onto floating-point paths.

f331dacc-077f-473e-8d0e-f4918a0534b2.name: Float Two
f331dacc-077f-473e-8d0e-f4918a0534b2.label: hidden
f331dacc-077f-473e-8d0e-f4918a0534b2.description: Hidden helper to double FPS when interpolation is enabled.

252211dd-7a26-4b47-b3f9-158783a99162.name: Interpolated Frame Rate (float)
252211dd-7a26-4b47-b3f9-158783a99162.label: hidden
252211dd-7a26-4b47-b3f9-158783a99162.description: Hidden helper that doubles the output FPS when interpolation is enabled.

0d4f8775-4018-44b7-b366-9fbe2672f62a.name: Input Compression
0d4f8775-4018-44b7-b366-9fbe2672f62a.label: advanced
0d4f8775-4018-44b7-b366-9fbe2672f62a.description: Compression value used when preprocessing the source image for LTX conditioning.

842c90fc-f029-41ab-82e1-cc9ebb9355a4.name: Latent Scale Helper
842c90fc-f029-41ab-82e1-cc9ebb9355a4.label: advanced
842c90fc-f029-41ab-82e1-cc9ebb9355a4.description: Scale factor used to build the lower-resolution latent canvas before upscaling.

a66387ac-cc67-4a22-9423-f5c96db0fe79.name: Guide Scale Helper
a66387ac-cc67-4a22-9423-f5c96db0fe79.label: advanced
a66387ac-cc67-4a22-9423-f5c96db0fe79.description: Scale factor used to size guide images before preprocessing and injection.

e04b4b5b-d267-438a-b5a6-947e0f4efe9e.name: Max Shift
e04b4b5b-d267-438a-b5a6-947e0f4efe9e.label: advanced
e04b4b5b-d267-438a-b5a6-947e0f4efe9e.description: Upper scheduler shift bound for the base pass.

7f32b29c-87e0-4a94-880c-c06801694e1f.name: Scale Method
7f32b29c-87e0-4a94-880c-c06801694e1f.label: advanced
7f32b29c-87e0-4a94-880c-c06801694e1f.description: Resampling method used when resizing images inside the workflow.

29b7afa1-f512-4de3-ac34-fcfd44ce19bd.name: Scheduler Terminal
29b7afa1-f512-4de3-ac34-fcfd44ce19bd.label: advanced
29b7afa1-f512-4de3-ac34-fcfd44ce19bd.description: Terminal value used by the LTX scheduler in the base pass.

d949d308-ff08-40dd-9d96-99c4296c0554.name: Stretch Schedule
d949d308-ff08-40dd-9d96-99c4296c0554.label: advanced
d949d308-ff08-40dd-9d96-99c4296c0554.description: Whether the base-pass scheduler stretches its schedule across the latent sequence.

c0d07164-6e84-4737-8e7a-926347893bc5.name: Upscale Guidance
c0d07164-6e84-4737-8e7a-926347893bc5.label: advanced
c0d07164-6e84-4737-8e7a-926347893bc5.description:
Classifier-free guidance for the upscale pass. Keep it close to 1 unless you are intentionally retuning.

[Official image-to-video guide: CFG](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#cfg-classifier-free-guidance)

224fb2d3-d133-4fbf-805f-f5220a9bdacf.name: Upscale Sampler Type
224fb2d3-d133-4fbf-805f-f5220a9bdacf.label: advanced
224fb2d3-d133-4fbf-805f-f5220a9bdacf.description:
Sampler used in the upscale pass. The upstream two-stage example uses euler_cfg_pp.

[Official image-to-video guide: sampler type](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#sampler-type)

fe09dd20-d140-45ff-93b8-1fa6cdbe091a.name: Upscale Seed
fe09dd20-d140-45ff-93b8-1fa6cdbe091a.label: config
fe09dd20-d140-45ff-93b8-1fa6cdbe091a.description:
Seed for the upscale pass. Keep it fixed to compare detail changes consistently. The official guide recommends fixed seeds when iterating and previewing Stage 1 versus the final upscale pass.

[Official image-to-video guide: seed](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#seed)
[Official image-to-video guide: Stage 2 upscale pass](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#stage-2-upscale-pass)

46c7ccfe-8bf6-4715-ae9b-c66576688cc9.name: Resize Crop
46c7ccfe-8bf6-4715-ae9b-c66576688cc9.label: config
46c7ccfe-8bf6-4715-ae9b-c66576688cc9.description: How to handle aspect-ratio mismatch when resizing the source image. Center preserves aspect ratio by cropping; disabled stretches to fit.

e69234a0-82da-4ae3-8e36-90108650616b.name: Negative Prompt
e69234a0-82da-4ae3-8e36-90108650616b.label: advanced
e69234a0-82da-4ae3-8e36-90108650616b.description:
Describe unwanted motion, objects, style, or artifacts to avoid in the result. Keep it short, concrete, and focused on failure modes you do not want in the shot.

[Prompting guide: what to avoid](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/prompting-guide#what-to-avoid)

value.immediate: blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles

24700f9f-cb74-4b81-8f33-b99cdba36600.name: Adapter Prompt
24700f9f-cb74-4b81-8f33-b99cdba36600.label: advanced
24700f9f-cb74-4b81-8f33-b99cdba36600.description: Prompt with the adapter LoRA trigger prepended.

53e614a7-cd12-4c1b-9204-1b2cee31ba5d.name: Selected Prompt
53e614a7-cd12-4c1b-9204-1b2cee31ba5d.label: advanced
53e614a7-cd12-4c1b-9204-1b2cee31ba5d.description: Switches between the original prompt and the adapter-triggered prompt.

79121d0e-610e-44fa-8d98-e27975318d39.name: Selected Output Audio
79121d0e-610e-44fa-8d98-e27975318d39.label: advanced
79121d0e-610e-44fa-8d98-e27975318d39.description: Select which audio stream is attached to the final video output.

e4a93407-ba2e-4a76-a3f1-2672d6dfb5f0.name: Selected Upscaled Frames
e4a93407-ba2e-4a76-a3f1-2672d6dfb5f0.label: advanced
e4a93407-ba2e-4a76-a3f1-2672d6dfb5f0.description: Select whether the upscaled output uses the spatial result or the interpolated result.

5517f3de-d2c9-4c36-a28a-5902d56fb8e0.name: Selected Output Frames
5517f3de-d2c9-4c36-a28a-5902d56fb8e0.label: advanced
5517f3de-d2c9-4c36-a28a-5902d56fb8e0.description: Select whether the final video uses base-pass frames or the upscaled result.

e313fabf-c4a5-4d81-99b9-7e448b6eb271.name: Selected Upscaled FPS
e313fabf-c4a5-4d81-99b9-7e448b6eb271.label: hidden
e313fabf-c4a5-4d81-99b9-7e448b6eb271.description: Select whether the upscaled output uses the base FPS or doubled FPS for interpolation.

18843f24-8f17-4434-8449-d0969c000521.name: Selected Output FPS
18843f24-8f17-4434-8449-d0969c000521.label: hidden
